subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Celtic at sea, 1912-12-11
subcodes.first_line: What would you say if I were to suddenly enter the Masjid Shah in Tehran, and say to the enemies of the Faith
subcodes.first_line_orig: چه می‌گوئید که من یکمرتبه وارد مسجد شاه طهران شوم و بمعاندین بگویم شما مرا جستجو
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @rejection, opposition and persecution
